calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)
Written order not issued. Dismissal on file.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-07-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion To Re-Open Discovery
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kevn P. McLaughling, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: JAMES CELEDON
Andrew M. Gschwind, DCA, for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF JAMES CELEDON Notice And Motion To Re-Open Discovery is granted, limited to Exhibit F and any reference to LRV No. 1461, and the 9 a.m. control log entry and any codes contained in that entry. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.
